rationale: Review 2 would produce the better-scoped PR because it targets the clearly confirmable overreach in the diff: premature `True` placeholder Reductive/Semisimple classes and the early `IsUnipotent`, while preserving/splitting plausible Layer-0 material instead of demanding broader removal. Review 1 shares the real placeholder/unipotence concerns, but its extra bundling objection depends on unshown roadmap context and would risk unnecessary churn if acted on.
